architecture.kind: N4 recurrent direct-render MLP — v3 arch + TEACHER-GATED SPATIAL FIREFLY LOSS

gate: presents ONLY if real_image_ordeal writes a PASS stamp beside this file

firefly_loss.form: MSE + gate·ff_w·Σ_c relu(out_c − teacher_kxk_max_c − margin)² in demod-log space
firefly_loss.gate: 1 where teacher k×k neighbourhood max-luminance < dark_pct-percentile ceiling, else 0
firefly_loss.note: penalises invented dots ONLY over dark teacher neighbourhoods; real neon/windows are plain MSE (gate=0) — fixes N3 v4's over-clamp of the cyan waterline

training.monitor: ordeal sparkle + resid on held-out val pose orbit_-20, keep lowest-resid sparkle-passing net
